MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Kimberly Chu, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, appearing for moving party Brayton Purcell.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF ROSEMARIE GIL VALDIVIA, AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Ms. Chu appears to ask for a one-week continuance to allow time for her to file the documents set forth in the court's tentative ruling.

The Court stated that it will consider the requested documents if they are received before June 4, 2024. If the proof of services with the addresses are provided the Court will consider granting the motion.

The matter is "tentatively" continued to June 4, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 301 for the requested documents set forth in the court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/RCE)

*** Following the hearing, the requested documents were received and reviewed by the court. An order granting the motion was filed on May 31, 2024. The tentative continuance to June 4, 2024 was vacated. ***
